description: State-Based Marketplace issuer formulary source registry. Each entry provides the machine-readable index.json URL for a QHP issuer in an SBM state. Used by scripts/fetch/fetch_formulary_sbm.py. Entries with direct_drugs_url bypass index.json discovery and fetch drugs directly.
last_updated: 2026-04-03 (15-state PDF audit: 41 PDFs fetched, 65,266 drugs parsed across 11 states)
research_notes: 2026-03-19 sweep #2 (Centene TiC investigation): Fetched all 4 official Centene index.json files (ambetter, healthnet, fidelis, wellcarenc) from centene.com/content/dam/. ALL FOUR ARE LIVE (200 OK, application/json). However they are Transparency-in-Coverage MRFs (reporting_structure contains in_network_files + allowed_amount_file ONLY  --  no formulary/drug data). The Ambetter TiC index covers 28 states (AL AR AZ CA DE FL GA IA IL IN KS KY LA MI MO MS NC NE NH NJ NV OH OK PA SC TN TX WA) but these are network/pricing files, not QHP formulary. Health Net CA (HIOS 67138) FormularyNavigator /67138/1-14/drugs.json â†' 500 HTML error. Fidelis NY (HIOS 25303, corrected from 16842 in registry) FormularyNavigator /25303/1-4/drugs.json â†' 500 HTML error. Confirmed: no accessible QHP formulary endpoint for CA or NY via any Centene/FormularyNavigator pattern tested. Prior 2026-03-19 sweep: Molina redirects to cmsjson/378245. Kaiser MD live. Healthfirst NY FL-only. Cigna CO 5,699 records. CareFirst DC/MD VA-only.

centene_ambetter.coverage: All Centene/Ambetter states (AZ, NE, GA, IL, FL, TX, NC, etc.)
centene_ambetter.notes: Open directory, no auth required. Contains SBC PDFs for all Ambetter/Centene QHP plans. Plan IDs match HIOS format. English and Spanish versions available.

issuers.notes: HIOS ID 18126. MR index.json still 403 Forbidden. BUT direct PDF formulary found: 2026 CA formulary PDF (~2.5 MB, 200 OK). Hosted on Akamai CDN. Parsed 1,125 drugs with pdfplumber. JSON MR path blocked but PDF is public.

HIOS ID 40513. MR index.json still 403 (bot protection). BUT direct PDF formulary found: 2026 commercial marketplace formulary (~2.7 MB, 200 OK, updated today). Different content/dam path bypasses bot protection. Parsed 3,175 drugs with pdfplumber.

HIOS ID 67138. Centene Marketplace product in CA via Health Net subsidiary (ifp.healthnetcalifornia.com). CONFIRMED IN CENTENE TIC INDEX 2026-03-19: centene.com .../2026-03-04_healthnet_index.json is LIVE (200 OK) but is a Transparency-in-Coverage MRF (in_network_files + allowed_amounts only  --  no formulary/drug data). 58 plans with IDs 67138CA* confirmed in TiC index. FORMULARY ENDPOINTS EXHAUSTED: api.centene.com/ambetter/reference/drugs-AMB-CA.json â†' 404. api.centene.com/ambetter/reference/drugs-HN-CA.json â†' 404. api.centene.com/healthnet/reference/drugs-HN-CA.json â†' 404. FormularyNavigator /67138/1-14/drugs.json â†' 500 HTML error. ifp.healthnetcalifornia.com â†' 200 HTML (not JSON). 30+ patterns tested 2026-03-19. Health Net CA QHP formulary has no accessible public endpoint.

HIOS 41304. Central/Western MA. Complete HMO/PPO networks. Complete HMO 1000 plan names. Worcester MA-based HMO. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.
5-tier Clarity formulary. Needs parser tuning.

HIOS 88806. MA statewide. Community Care network. Community Care Connector Low Gold/High Bronze plan names. Possibly AllWays Health Partners (formerly Neighborhood Health Plan / MGB) or Fallon TPA entity. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF.

GA.notes: Georgia Access launched PY2025 as SBM. Centene/Ambetter is the only issuer with confirmed machine-readable formulary data. drugs-AMB-GA.json contains plan IDs for issuers 45495 and 70893.

issuers.issuer_name: Ambetter from Peach State Health Management (GA)
issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. 52.8 MB drug file. Plan IDs 45495GA* and 70893GA* found. Same Centene API pattern as NJ/PA/WA/IL/KY/NV. GA present in Centene index.json state list.

issuers.issuer_name: Ambetter from Peach State Health Management (GA #2)
issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Same drug file as issuer 45495. Second HIOS ID for Ambetter GA found in plan_id prefixes.

ME.notes: Maine SBM. No Centene presence (404). Community Health Options and Harvard Pilgrim (Point32Health) have no discoverable MR formulary endpoints. Elevance index references ME in provider data but drug files need verification for ME plan IDs.

issuers.notes: HIOS ID corrected 2026-03-19: was 00000 (wrong/placeholder). 2025 SBM Plan-PUF confirms current HIOS ID. Maine Statewide network. Plan names: 'Health Options Clear Choice Bronze $7500 PPO NE'. Community Health Options is a Maine-based CO-OP insurer.
issuers.issuer_id_note: HIOS ID corrected 2026-03-19: was 00000 (wrong/placeholder). 2025 SBM Plan-PUF confirms current HIOS ID.

issuers.issuer_name: Harvard Pilgrim Health Care of New England (ME)
issuers.notes: 404. Now part of Point32Health (merger with Tufts). point32health.org also 404. Same finding as MA entry. Tested 2026-03-18.

issuers.issuer_name: Anthem Blue Cross (ME)  --  via Elevance Health
issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Elevance index -> FormularyNavigator drugs/35. ME plan IDs 48396ME* confirmed. 3,791+ drugs in first 100KB. Standard CMS QHP schema.

HIOS 54879. Taro Health Maine MP Network. Plan names: TARO Direct Primary Care Bronze 4150, TARO Direct Primary Care Silver 1900. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. TARO Health is a Direct Primary Care (DPC) integrated insurer in Maine. New entrant to ME exchange. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.

issuers.issuer_name: Unknown ME issuer (Maine's Choice Plus HMO)
issuers.notes: HIOS 96667. Maine's Choice Plus HMO network. Plan names: Clear Choice Maine's Choice Plus HMO Silver 4200 w/ Pedi Dental. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. 'Clear Choice' prefix shared with CHO (33653). HMO entity distinct from CHO's PPO product. Possibly Community Health Options HMO entity or Harvard Pilgrim Health Care of New England ME-specific entity. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.

VA.notes: Virginia SBM-FP (uses healthcare.gov platform). CareFirst BCBS confirmed LIVE with VA plan IDs. 5 drug files accessible. Optima Health and Kaiser not discoverable. No Centene presence (404).

issuers.notes: CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Index.json -> Drugs_1.json through Drugs_5.json. All plan IDs are VA (10207VA*, 40308VA*). Standard CMS QHP schema. Same index as DC/MD entries but only VA data in drug files.
CONFIRMED LIVE 2026-03-18. Same CareFirst index as issuer 10207. VA plan IDs 40308VA* found in Drugs_1.json. CareFirst BlueChoice is CareFirst subsidiary.

HIOS ID corrected 2026-03-19: was 00000 (wrong/placeholder). 2025 SBM Plan-PUF confirms current HIOS ID. Sentara IFP (Individual/Family Plan) network. Plan names: 'Sentara M Bronze 6000 Ded HSA', 'Sentara M Gold 800 Ded'. Sentara Healthcare (Norfolk, VA-based system). Formerly Optima Health, rebranded Sentara Health Plans.
issuers.issuer_id_note: HIOS ID corrected 2026-03-19: was 00000 (wrong/placeholder). 2025 SBM Plan-PUF confirms current HIOS ID.

issuers.notes: HIOS ID corrected 2026-03-19: was 00543 (wrong/placeholder). 2025 SBM Plan-PUF confirms current HIOS ID. Kaiser Foundation Health Plan of Mid Atlantic States Incorporated Signature network. Plan names: 'KP VA Platinum 0 Ded/Vision', 'KP VA Gold 0 Ded/Vision'. KP Mid-Atlantic VA entity. Note: 00543 used for KP CO/DC/MD as placeholder; VA-specific HIOS is 95185. MD entry (00543) confirmed live separately.
issuers.issuer_id_note: HIOS ID corrected 2026-03-19: was 00543 (wrong/placeholder). 2025 SBM Plan-PUF confirms current HIOS ID.

issuers.notes: HIOS 24251. Individual Exchange Benefit Plans. Plan names: UHC Gold Standard, UHC Bronze Standard, UHC Silver Standard. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. UHC VA QHP entity. Standard-tier plans. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.

issuers.issuer_name: Unknown VA issuer (Bronze Classic Standard / Secure)
issuers.notes: HIOS 25922. Virginia EPO network. Plan names: Secure, Bronze Classic Standard, Silver Classic Standard. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. 'Bronze Classic Standard' naming matches NY HIOS 74289 (also unidentified). Possibly Cigna VA or Oscar Health VA. 'Secure' plan also offered. Statewide VA EPO. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.

HIOS 41921. Virginia Connect Network. Plan names: Connect Bronze 6500 Indiv Med Deductible, Connect Gold 750 Indiv Med Deductible. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. 'Connect' branded plans with Virginia Connect Network. Possibly HealthKeepers Connect or a separate Elevance/Anthem product in VA. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.

HIOS 86443. HMO_IH Virginia (Innovation Health HMO). Plan names: Innovation Health - Aetna Bronze S: HMO, Innovation Health - Aetna Gold S: HMO. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. Innovation Health is Aetna's Northern Virginia HMO subsidiary (joint venture with Inova Health System). HIOS 86443 = Innovation Health Inc. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.

HIOS 88380. Pathway X Tiered PCP & Hospital / HealthKeepers network. Plan names: Anthem HealthKeepers Catastrophic X DED 9200, Anthem HealthKeepers Bronze X DED 5500. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. Anthem HealthKeepers Plus is Anthem's flagship VA HMO/EPO product. Elevance Health VA QHP entity. Elevance national drugs file has OOM risk; VA plan ID 88380VA* not yet verified in drug file. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.

HIOS 93187. HMO_Virginia (Aetna HMO network). Plan names: Gold S: HMO Aetna network of doctors & hospitals, Bronze S: HMO Aetna network of doctors & hospitals. Identified from 2025 SBM Plan-PUF. Aetna VA HMO entity (distinct from Innovation Health 86443). Standard Aetna HMO plans. CVS Health subsidiary. No discoverable MR formulary endpoint.
